variant.description: One or more VCF strs containing variants to be included in the panel of normals.

output.description: Output VCF str to which the panel of normals should be written.

input.description: BAM/SAM/CRAM str containing reads. Must be specified at least once.

output.description: Output str to which callable loci should be written.

summary.description: Output str to which callable loci summary should be written.

min_depth.description: Minimum depth to consider a locus callable.

min_mapping_quality.description: Minimum mapping quality to consider a read.

min_base_quality.description: Minimum base quality to consider a read.

input.description: BAM/SAM/CRAM str containing reads. Must be specified at least once.

known_sites.description: One or more databases of known polymorphic sites.

output.description: Output recalibration table str to create.

add_output_sam_program_record.description: If true, adds a PG tag to created SAM/BAM/CRAM strs.

add_output_vcf_command_line.description: If true, adds a command line header line to created VCF strs.

arguments_str.description: Read one or more arguments strs and add them to the command line.

binary_tag_name.description: The binary tag covariate name if using it.

cloud_index_prefetch_buffer.description: Size of the cloud‑only prefetch buffer (MB; 0 to disable).

cloud_prefetch_buffer.description: Size of the cloud‑only prefetch buffer (MB; 0 to disable).

create_output_bam_index.description: Create a BAM/CRAM index when writing coordinate‑sorted output.

create_output_bam_md5.description: Create an MD5 digest for any BAM/SAM/CRAM str created.

create_output_variant_index.description: Create a VCF index when writing coordinate‑sorted VCF output.

create_output_variant_md5.description: Create an MD5 digest for any VCF str created.

deletions_default_quality.description: Default quality for the base deletions covariate.

disable_read_filter.description: Read filters to be disabled before analysis; may be given multiple times.

disable_sequence_dictionary_validation.description: Do not check sequence dictionaries for compatibility.

exclude_intervals.description: Genomic intervals to exclude; may be specified multiple times.

gatk_config_str.description: A configuration str to use with GATK.

gcs_project_for_requester_pays.description: Project to bill when accessing requester‑pays buckets.

indels_context_size.description: k‑mer context size for insertions/deletions covariates.

insertions_default_quality.description: Default quality for the base insertions covariate.

interval_exclusion_padding.description: Padding (bp) to add to each excluded interval.

interval_padding.description: Padding (bp) to add to each included interval.

interval_set_rule.description: Set merging approach for combining interval inputs.

intervals.description: Genomic intervals over which to operate; may be repeated.

inverted_read_filter.description: Inverted read filters; may be given multiple times.

low_quality_tail.description: Minimum quality for bases in the tail of reads.

max_variants_per_shard.description: Partition VCF output into shards of this many records.

maximum_cycle_value.description: Maximum cycle value permitted for the Cycle covariate.

mismatches_context_size.description: k‑mer context size for mismatch covariate.

preserve_qscores_less_than.description: Do not recalibrate bases with quality scores less than this.

quantizing_levels.description: Number of distinct quality scores in the quantized output.

read_filter.description: Read filters to apply; may be specified multiple times.

read_index.description: Indices for read inputs; must be given in same order as inputs.

read_validation_stringency.description: Validation stringency for all SAM/BAM/CRAM/SRA strs.

seconds_between_progress_updates.description: Output traversal statistics every N seconds.

sequence_dictionary.description: Use the given sequence dictionary as the master dictionary.

sites_only_vcf_output.description: Do not emit genotype fields when writing VCF output.

use_jdk_deflater.description: Use the JdkDeflater instead of IntelDeflater.

use_jdk_inflater.description: Use the JdkInflater instead of IntelInflater.

use_original_qualities.description: Use base quality scores from the OQ tag.

version.description: Display the version number for this tool.

disable_tool_default_read_filters.description: Disable all tool default read filters.

_thread_spec.description: Mutect2 does not expose a global thread flag.

input.description: BAM/SAM/CRAM str containing reads; may be given multiple times.

output.description: str to which variants should be written.

add_output_sam_program_record.description: Adds a PG tag to created SAM/BAM/CRAM strs.

add_output_vcf_command_line.description: Adds a command line header line to created VCF strs.

af_of_alleles_not_in_resource.description: Population allele fraction for alleles not in germline resource.

alleles.description: Set of alleles to force-call regardless of evidence.

annotation.description: Specific annotations to add to variant calls; repeatable.

annotation_group.description: Group of annotations to apply; repeatable.

annotations_to_exclude.description: Annotations to exclude from variant calls; repeatable.

arguments_str.description: Read argument str(s) and add to command line.

assembly_region_out.description: Output the assembly region to this IGV formatted str.

base_quality_score_threshold.description: Bases below this quality will be reduced to minimum.

callable_depth.description: Minimum depth to be considered callable for Mutect stats.

cloud_index_prefetch_buffer.description: Size of cloud‑only prefetch buffer (MB; 0 to disable).

cloud_prefetch_buffer.description: Size of cloud‑only prefetch buffer (MB; 0 to disable).

create_output_bam_index.description: Create a BAM/CRAM index when writing coordinate‑sorted output.

create_output_bam_md5.description: Create an MD5 digest for any BAM/SAM/CRAM str created.

create_output_variant_index.description: Create a VCF index when writing coordinate‑sorted VCF output.

create_output_variant_md5.description: Create an MD5 digest for any VCF str created.

disable_read_filter.description: Read filters to be disabled; repeatable.

dont_use_dragstr_pair_hmm_scores.description: Disable DRAGstr pair‑hmm score even when dragstr‑params‑path provided.

dont_use_soft_clipped_bases.description: Do not analyze soft‑clipped bases in the reads.

downsampling_stride.description: Downsample a pool of reads starting within a range of bases.

dragstr_het_hom_ratio.description: Het to hom prior ratio used with DRAGstr.

dragstr_params_path.description: Location of DRAGstr model parameters for STR error correction.

enable_dynamic_read_disqualification_for.description: Enable less strict read disqualification for low base quality reads.

f1r2_max_depth.description: Sites with depth higher than this value will be grouped.

f1r2_median_mq.description: Skip sites with median mapping quality below this value.

f1r2_min_bq.description: Exclude bases below this quality from pileup.

f1r2_tar_gz.description: Tar.gz str to collect F1R2 counts.

flow_order_for_annotations.description: Flow order for this annotation; repeatable.

founder_id.description: Samples representing the population founders; repeatable.

gatk_config_str.description: A configuration str to use with GATK.

gcs_project_for_requester_pays.description: Project to bill when accessing requester‑pays buckets.

genotype_germline_sites.description: Call all apparent germline sites (they will be filtered later).

genotype_germline_sites_fraction.description: Fraction of germline sites to genotype randomly.

genotype_pon_sites.description: Call sites in the PoN even though they will be filtered.

germline_resource.description: Population VCF of germline sequencing containing allele fractions.

graph_output.description: Write debug assembly graph information to this str.

ignore_itr_artifacts.description: Turn off clipping of artifacts near inverted tandem repeats.

initial_tumor_lod.description: Log10 odds threshold to consider pileup active.

interval_exclusion_padding.description: Padding to add to excluded intervals.

interval_padding.description: Padding to add to included intervals.

interval_set_rule.description: Set merging approach for interval inputs.

intervals.description: Genomic intervals over which to operate; repeatable.

max_assembly_region_size.description: Maximum size of an assembly region.

max_population_af.description: Maximum population allele frequency in tumor‑only mode.

max_reads_per_alignment_start.description: Max reads to retain per alignment start; others downsampled.

min_assembly_region_size.description: Minimum size of an assembly region.

min_base_quality_score.description: Minimum base quality required for calling.

mitochondria_mode.description: Mitochondria mode sets emissions and initial LODs to 0.

native_pair_hmm_use_double_precision.description: Use double precision in native pairHMM (slower).

normal_lod.description: Log10 odds threshold for calling normal variant non‑germline.

normal_sample.description: BAM sample name of normal(s); repeatable.

panel_of_normals.description: VCF str of sites observed in normal.

pcr_indel_qual.description: Phred‑scaled PCR indel qual for overlapping fragments.

pcr_snv_qual.description: Phred‑scaled PCR SNV qual for overlapping fragments.

pedigree.description: Pedigree str for determining population founders.

permutect_alt_downsample.description: Downsample alt reads to this count for Permutect training.

permutect_non_artifact_ratio.description: Number of non‑artifact data per artifact datum for Permutect.

permutect_ref_downsample.description: Downsample ref reads when generating Permutect dataset.

permutect_test_dataset.description: Destination for Permutect test data collection.

permutect_test_truth.description: VCF str of known variants for Permutect test data.

permutect_training_dataset.description: Destination for Permutect training data collection.

permutect_training_truth.description: VCF str of known variants for Permutect training data.

read_index.description: Indices to use for the read inputs; repeatable.

read_validation_stringency.description: Validation stringency for all SAM/BAM/CRAM/SRA strs.

seconds_between_progress_updates.description: Output traversal statistics every N seconds.

sequence_dictionary.description: Use the given sequence dictionary as master.

sites_only_vcf_output.description: Do not emit genotype fields in VCF output.

tumor_lod_to_emit.description: Log10 odds threshold to emit variant to VCF.

use_jdk_deflater.description: Use JDK Deflater instead of IntelDeflater.

use_jdk_inflater.description: Use JDK Inflater instead of IntelInflater.

INPUT.description: Input BAM/CRAM/SAM str(s); must be coordinate sorted.

METRICS_str.description: str to write duplication metrics to.

ADD_PG_TAG_TO_READS.description: Add PG tag to each read.

ASSUME_SORT_ORDER.description: Assume input has this sort order.

CLEAR_DT.description: Clear DT tag from input reads.

COMMENT.description: Comments to include in output header; repeatable.

CREATE_INDEX.description: Create index when writing VCF or coordinate‑sorted BAM.

CREATE_MD5_str.description: Create MD5 digest for any BAM/FASTQ strs created.

DUPLICATE_SCORING_STRATEGY.description: Strategy for choosing non‑duplicate among candidates.

FLOW_DUP_STRATEGY.description: Quality summing strategy for flow based reads.

FLOW_EFFECTIVE_QUALITY_THRESHOLD.description: Threshold for considering a quality value high enough.

FLOW_MODE.description: Enable parameters specific to flow based reads.

FLOW_Q_IS_KNOWN_END.description: Treat trimmed read end based on quality as known end.

FLOW_SKIP_FIRST_N_FLOWS.description: Skip first N flows when considering duplicates.

FLOW_UNPAIRED_END_UNCERTAINTY.description: Max difference of read end position for duplicates.

FLOW_UNPAIRED_START_UNCERTAINTY.description: Max difference of read start position for duplicates.

FLOW_USE_END_IN_UNPAIRED_READS.description: Make unpaired read end location significant when considering duplicates.

FLOW_USE_UNPAIRED_CLIPPED_END.description: Use clipping position as end position for unpaired reads.

MAX_str_HANDLES_FOR_READ_ENDS_MAP.description: Maximum str handles to keep open for read ends map.

MAX_OPTICAL_DUPLICATE_SET_SIZE.description: Maximum size of a duplicate set for optical detection.

MAX_RECORDS_IN_RAM.description: Number of records stored in RAM before spilling to disk.

MAX_SEQUENCES_FOR_DISK_READ_ENDS_MAP.description: Obsolete; read ends always spilled to disk.

MOLECULAR_IDENTIFIER_TAG.description: SAM tag to uniquely identify the molecule; requires BARCODE_TAG.

OPTICAL_DUPLICATE_PIXEL_DISTANCE.description: Max offset between clusters to consider them optical duplicates.

PROGRAM_GROUP_COMMAND_LINE.description: CL tag value for PG record.

PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME.description: PN tag value for PG record.

PROGRAM_GROUP_VERSION.description: VN tag value for PG record.

PROGRAM_RECORD_ID.description: Program record ID for the @PG record(s) created.

READ_NAME_REGEX.default: <optimized capture of last three ':' separated fields as numeric values>
READ_NAME_REGEX.description: Regex to extract tile,x,y coordinates from read name.

REMOVE_DUPLICATES.description: If true, do not write duplicates to output.

REMOVE_SEQUENCING_DUPLICATES.description: If true remove sequencing duplicates even if REMOVE_DUPLICATES is false.

SORTING_COLLECTION_SIZE_RATIO.description: Determines memory footprint of sorting collections.

TAG_DUPLICATE_SET_MEMBERS.description: Tag reads with duplicate set size/index.

TAGGING_POLICY.description: How duplicate types are recorded in the DT tag.

TMP_DIR.description: One or more temp directories; repeatable.

USE_JDK_DEFLATER.description: Use JDK Deflater for compressed output.

USE_JDK_INFLATER.description: Use JDK Inflater for compressed input.

VALIDATION_STRINGENCY.description: Validation stringency for SAM strs read by this program.

input.description: One or more .tar.gz containing outputs of CollectF1R2Counts.

gcs_project_for_requester_pays.description: Project to bill for requester‑pays buckets.

max_depth.description: Group sites with depth higher than this value.

num_em_iterations.description: Give up on EM after this many iterations.

use_jdk_deflater.description: Use the JdkDeflater instead of IntelDeflater.

use_jdk_inflater.description: Use the JdkInflater instead of IntelInflater.
